title: Algerian Tuna Tagine
description: A traditional Algerian-inspired dish made with tuna, glazed carrots, and a blend of spices.

ingredients.name: Algerian Spices (1 tsp)
ingredients.notes: A blend of cumin, coriander, and cinnamon

instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of olive oil in a large saucepan over medium heat.
Add the onion and garlic and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the Algerian Spices and cook for 1 minute.
Add the flaked tuna and cook until heated through.
Add the glazed carrots and cook for an additional 2-3 minutes.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Garnish with chopped cilantro and serve.
